# Obstacle/Threat Template

## Format

```
**[Name]** - [Type]

Difficulty: [threshold or countdown]
Triggered by: [what activates it]
Consequence: [what happens on failure]
```

## Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description | Example |
|-------------|-------------|---------|
| `[Name]` | Obstacle name | "Collapsing Bridge" |
| `[Type]` | Category | "Environmental", "Social", "Combat" |
| `[Difficulty]` | Challenge level | "Hard (10+)", "Countdown 4" |
| `[Triggered by]` | Activation condition | "Crossing without caution" |
| `[Consequence]` | Failure result | "Take 2-harm, separated from group" |

## Customization Notes

Adapt this template based on the game system:
- For countdown systems: use `Clock: [segments]`
- For combat encounters: add `Attacks:` and `Defenses:`
- For puzzle/mystery: add `Clues needed:` and `Red herrings:`
- For social obstacles: add `Stakes:` and `Leverage required:`
